driver_subject: crypto: amcc - switch to AES library for GCM key derivation
kernel_subject: crypto: aes - create AES library based on the fixed time AES code
stage1_reason: Direct replacement of deprecated crypto_cipher API calls (crypto_alloc_cipher, crypto_cipher_setkey, crypto_cipher_encrypt_one, crypto_free_cipher) with new AES library functions (aes_expandkey, aes_encrypt, memzero_explicit) as indicated in commit message and diff.
stage2_reason: Driver commit explicitly switches deprecated crypto_cipher API to new AES library functions (aes_expandkey, aes_encrypt). Kernel commit e59c1c987456 introduces the AES library with those exact functions, providing the replacement API.
